decisions.title: Scope pivot: post-release PRD consistency pass
decisions.description: All PRD release checklist gates are already marked Done. This cycle will advance PRD quality by removing stale contradictory changelog text and adding explicit release-closeout note, then validate and open PR via gh from dedicated branch.
alternatives: Force new technical gate work despite no pending gates (rejected due artificial scope and risk).

decisions.title: Minimal PRD consistency patch
decisions.description: Apply doc-only change in PRD changelog: remove stale statement that Gate 11 is pending and add explicit release-closeout note. No runtime/test/config changes required.
alternatives: Run new technical changes despite zero pending gates (rejected).

decisions.title: Execution completed with minimal PRD changelog fix
decisions.description: Applied minimal doc-only patch in PRD-0002 to remove stale Gate 11 pending note and add release-closeout changelog entry. No code paths, contracts, handlers, or runtime behavior were changed.
alternatives: Expand scope to new feature work (rejected to keep PRD advancement minimal and low-risk).

decisions.title: Validation gates passed with no regressions
decisions.description: Validation run completed successfully: make docs-check, make invariants-check, make test-workspace, make lint, and make go-tidy-check all passed. No runtime regressions observed because patch is documentation-only.
alternatives: Skip validation due doc-only scope (rejected to preserve gate discipline).
